channel.title: Changelog Feed
channel.description: Changes for each version of the software.

item.title: Version 1.108.45 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.45

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now identify the startup parameters when an SAP Fiori elements application is launched as an embedded application from My Inbox
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adjust worker initialization

item.title: Version 1.108.47 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.47

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnsController now works with the index from the table event
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fixed weekday announcement in multi-month setup
  • Library: sap.viz
    • Type: FIX, Description: Correct month and time calculation errors caused by numericFormatter

item.title: Version 1.108.37 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.37

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue related to the enablement of standard actions on tables
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve resolved an issue with truncation of the draft indicator in grid tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the filter field displayed an incorrect value upon application variant load
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessagePage: Icon ignored from screen readers
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now adapted the usage of 'navigationFinished', the new navigation event
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: correct getUiState for Edm.String properties
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: correct description when multiple requests are send
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: renderWhitespace property is now applied when creating text controls
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/analytics/AnalyticalBinding#updateAnalyticalInfo: keep attribute properties in additional select

item.title: Version 1.108.35 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.35

  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display the correct timestamp when exporting dateTime fields to the XLS file format
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Height calculations for scrollable contents are preserved after invalidation
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the code to accommodate the changes related to the hostname in the response from the gateway
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now enhanced the method for detecting data loss to support nested app routes in My Inbox scenarios
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now enhanced the logic that allows access to the multiselection plug-in for the UI tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly retrieve the table and prepare paging information when switching between the subobject items
    • Type: FIX, Description: We no longer consider the URL parameter, save-appvar-id, when initiating the app
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: UoM in display mode in table is rendered with correct width for chinese
    • Type: FIX, Description: BaseController: Error is no longer thrown when data is extended
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/resource/ResourceModel#_handleLocalizationChange: wait for resource bundle to be loaded
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataListBinding: fire dataReceived event for aborted requests

item.title: Version 1.108.38 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.38

  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now set the correct state for the Selected property on the UploadSetItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Image: Inline svg rendering issue corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the truncation of timestamp issue in the feedListItem
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.SideNavigation: Add tooltip to the up and down arrow buttons
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ControlProvider: V4 value list annotation is now prioritized over V2
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: The correct filter field description is now applied when multiple validation requests are submitted

item.title: Version 1.108.46 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.46

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where changes made to the variant management-enabled table were lost during external navigation scenarios
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Preserve patterns in template values

item.title: Version 1.108.48 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.48

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: In the list report, focus handling for addCards functionality is now improved
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: correct SPECIFICMONTH to use number instead of Date
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: routing/History: avoid creating history entry when same hash is applied
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDCTable should use Context.getIndex if available to determine the context's position in the binding.
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL

item.title: Version 1.108.49 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.49

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterPanel: Single DynamicDateRange fields do not add default values
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.strings.formatMessage: Accept nullish arguments
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval: shows correct year
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE

item.title: Version 1.108.50 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.50

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've improved action handling by correctly identifying the determining action buttons on the list report page and the object page
    • Type: FIX, Description: Navigating back to the object page from a draft entity after activation using a determining action no longer causes errors

item.title: Version 1.108.51 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.51

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back from an analytical list page resulted in an unexpected error when the state of the browser history was undefined
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where attachments could not be opened in readOnly mode by including the __metadata.media_src property in the conditions for the media source
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and application state handling

item.title: Version 1.120.38 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.38

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: add a view settings dialog items active announcement
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: exception when changing binding context
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Preserve patterns in template values

item.title: Version 1.120.39 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.39

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: Fixed shapes drag drop issue when row highlight is enabled in Gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the rendering error of gantt chart total horizon on larger screens
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: Show footer after calling setShowFooter twice
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.p13n: integrate missing screen reader announcement for table filtering in SAP UI5 1.120
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where application title and navigation were not consistent when object page was embedded in the My Inbox application
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnsController now works with the index from the table event
    • Type: FIX, Description: Personalization/ColumnsController: column freeze is correctly preserved when comes from variant
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Add Condition button now has correct text and ScreenReader announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: GroupElement's visibility property remains unchanged if its value is bound
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction

item.title: Version 1.120.40 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.40

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.FlexibleColumnLayout: Store begin column width
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: Focus on popin area should not scroll on the main row
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: Fix failing tests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We no longer display the placeholder on the list report page when Apply Automatically is enabled for the variant but the required SmartFilterBar field contains invalid values
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to the object page from a draft entity after activation using a determining action caused errors
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField handles TextArrangement DescriptionOnly correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: Selection from ValueHelp in single fields now works correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: Improvement of UoM format handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: history values are now update from ValueHelpDialog
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: Focus on popin area should not scroll on the main row
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/type/Unit.js: if quantity part is integer, decimals defaults to '0', may be overwritten
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.ToolbarWrapper: Restore focus after applying text color
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarLegend: Add correct type for translation key

item.title: Version 1.120.31 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.31

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the type-ahead suggestions weren't shown when focusing on a field for the first time
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the type-ahead suggestions weren't shown when focusing on a field for the first time
    • Type: FIX, Description: We no longer trigger a search when unknown parameters are passed
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We no longer trigger a search when unknown parameters are passed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: Input controls: announced text is now following the guidelines
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.NotificationList: Focus correctly restored
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the illustratedMessage provided by a user was being overridden
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.calendar.Month: Improve day re-rendering peformance
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now enabled the screen reader announcement for navigation and action tiles
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: correct overlap when in text mode
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adaptation project now supports modification of the application-level settings in the SAP delivered apps
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the message popover remained open even after the item link was clicked
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the Select All checkbox was disabled by introducing a configurable boolean property
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpProvider: Absolute Path is now correctly encoded
    • Type: FIX, Description: ControlFactoryBase: support config enabledMultiSelectionPlugin on value help create
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.calendar.Month: Improve day re-rendering peformance

item.title: Version 1.120.35 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.35

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Discard Draft popover is shown correctly when the browser window is resized to a smaller size
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Discard Draft popover is shown correctly when the browser window is resized to a smaller size
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Discard Draft popover is shown correctly when the browser window is resized to a smaller size
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the SAP gateway issues for PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: has correct css parameters for active Emphasized
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The correct ARIA label is now assigned to Object page header forms
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve removed incorrect ARIA labels that were assigned to the footer of an object page
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: remove default sorting on mobile
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpProvider: Validate filters on initial data fetch
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/format/NumberFormat.js: support rounding of numbers given as string
    • Type: FIX, Description: routing/History: avoid creating history entry when same hash is applied
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.layout.PaneContainer: fix invalidation of nested panes

item.title: Version 1.120.41 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.41

  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the zoom level issue for StepwiseZoomStrategy in gantt chart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the parameter ordering mismatch between dependency array and function parameters in ShapeManager for Gantt 1.0
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDate: uses its own text for min and max validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL

item.title: Version 1.120.42 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.42

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: For the object page in the inline rows creation scenario, the DefaultValuesFunction is invoked after the smart table gets the binding context
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now remove action buttons from object page subsections in key user adaptation
    • Type: FIX, Description: Missing behavior files no longer cause an HTTP status code 404 (Not Found) error when loading canvas pages
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.mdc.Table: Ensure rebind before render on change appliance
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE

item.title: Version 1.120.43 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.43

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The draft activation confirmation popup is no longer displayed when the navigation from an object page opens a new browser window or tab

item.title: Version 1.136.9 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.9

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now exclude hidden properties in an analytical table when using the Export feature in split mode
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the setSelectionVariant API works correctly in tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with selecting cells in a grid table
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the DataFieldForAction label was not translated in an error message
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the DataFieldForAction label was not translated in an error message
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Focus issue prevented
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Set shadow style according to the "showArrow" property
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: Personalization/ColumnsController: column freeze is correctly preserved when comes from variant
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Add Condition button now has correct text and ScreenReader announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct and the value state is not overriden when not necessary
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartForm: getConderserInfo method is now handles SmartForm control instance correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: GroupElement's visibility property remains unchanged if its value is bound
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct when same invalid value is entered and no error is thrown
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct when same invalid value is entered and no error is thrown
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct when same invalid value is entered
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Saving composite keys in the variant is now supported
    • Type: FIX, Description: GroupElement is now hidden when there are no visible children
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: ComponentContainer: always propagate propagation listeners
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Month: removed redundant "selected" announce
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop

item.title: Version 1.136.10 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.10

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the busy indicator appears consistently for action parameter dialogs
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SplitContainer: Fixed box-shadow parameter
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where application title and navigation were not consistent when object page was embedded in the My Inbox application
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now configure the settings of related apps using the extension controller
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: Selection from ValueHelp in single fields now works correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: Improvement of UoM format handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: SVMUI2: Rename delVariant to deleteVariant
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/base/security/sanitizeHTML: Add support for modern CSS display values
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong title in AnchorBar

item.title: Version 1.136.11 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.11

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We’re introducing the SAP Fiori development portal to offer guidance to developers when creating SAP Fiori elements apps
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now use the default hierarchy qualifier from the service definition if no hierarchyQualifier is defined for a tree table
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display a key property in the create dialog when the key has a text annotation and doesn't have a Core.Computed annotation
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom fields are added correctly to variants
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue on the analytical list page where navigation failed after selecting a value from value help and pressing Enter
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: ExportDialog: Apply file type only with actual type change

item.title: Version 1.136.12 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.12

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now add the default value for an action parameter of type decimal
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Enabled property of actions is bound correctly for grouped table actions in custom sections
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to the object page from a draft entity after activation using a determining action caused errors
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField handles TextArrangement DescriptionOnly correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Remove unnecessary attributes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubsection: No role for promoted subsection

item.title: Version 1.136.14 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.14

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly manage the function import in the invokeAction method
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where referenced IDs in custom columns were not passed correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where multiple dropdown rows were created because of too many data requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We have resolved an issue where horizontal scrollbars did not render correctly in tables after exiting full-screen mode
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent event bubbling when LightBox is present
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a jump issue in the header container by using an outline instead of a border
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue in slide tile where the tile indicator buttons were not visible
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: onfocusfail no longer throws an error
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Skip onfocusin filtering after suggestion item selection for MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: missing token descriptions when setUiState is called after associateValueLists
    • Type: FIX, Description: personalization/Controller: Store normalized data in alreadyKnownRuntimeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Numeric keys are no longer parsed
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: Correct filtering from saved variant in P13n dialog
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.strings.formatMessage: Accept nullish arguments
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnLayout: role="form" rendered in display mode
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: initial Timezone leads to error
    • Type: FIX, Description: ActionToolbarAction: implement IToolbarInteractiveControl
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval: shows correct year
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: fix wrong aria-labelledBy id references
    • Type: FIX, Description: ObjectPageLayout: prevent endless loop in ResizeHandler callbacks

item.title: Version 1.136.16 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.16

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue when discarding a draft containing a DefaultValuesFunction by destroying the created context bindings
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the application can handle the SideEffects events when an action has been executed
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the default value for an action parameter with the decimal type did not contain quotes around "0"
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests

item.title: Version 1.136.13 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.13

  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Create action works correctly when inline edit is enabled in a list report page
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: resolve iPad Safari rendering issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: fixed focus on Planning Calendar Row
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: headerContent controls are now selectable in UI Adapt mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDate: uses its own text for min and max validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: The aria-labelledby attribute is now correctly set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectNumber: labelledby properly applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m Tokenizer: Ensure role "listbox" is applied to the correct container
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Default type is shown correctly in Info bar
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The AI-assisted easy filter now correctly handles semantic date fields when applying and resetting filters
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Short string keys now correctly select the corresponding row
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: resume binding of inner controls if FilterBar disabled it
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Suggestion selections are now handled correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnsController now works with the index from the table event
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Saving composite keys in the variant is now supported
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
  • Library: sap.ui.rta
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Page: headerContent controls are now selectable in UI Adapt mode
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.RecurrenceUtils: Comparison of UTC dates.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Ensure subsection visibility is tracked correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix initial title rendering in FCL

item.title: Version 1.136.15 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.15

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now remove action buttons from object page subsections in key user adaptation
    • Type: FIX, Description: The draft activation confirmation popup is no longer displayed when the navigation from an object page opens a new browser window or tab

item.title: Version 1.139.3 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.3

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Header visibility issue fixed
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Set shadow style according to the "showArrow" property
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: Improvement of UoM format handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: SVMUI2: Rename delVariant to deleteVariant
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Add Condition button now has correct text and ScreenReader announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: Personalization/ColumnsController: column freeze is correctly preserved when comes from variant
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartForm: getConderserInfo method is now handles SmartForm control instance correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/type/Unit.js: if quantity part is integer, decimals defaults to '0', may be overwritten
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/base/security/sanitizeHTML: Add support for modern CSS display values
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.Opa: Fix Safari polling interval test failure
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Month: removed redundant "selected" announce
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong title in AnchorBar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix wrong positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop

item.title: Version 1.139.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.1

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now exclude hidden properties in an analytical table when using the Export feature in split mode
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with selecting cells in a grid table
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the setSelectionVariant API works correctly in tables
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: qUnit tests are now stabilized
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: first token is now not truncated when not needed
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: add aria-expanded & aria-haspopup
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: Fix image not visible, when initials are incorrect
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the rendering issue of the interactive bar chart while navigating back to list report from an object page
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: stop calling suspend on item bindings if it suspended
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: prevent calling ensureFilterLoaded on each onBeforeRendering
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.core: make sap/ui/Device a standard AMD module
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/base: enable static inheritance for UI5 classes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Make the experimental new bootstrap the productive one
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/interaction: Cache failed requests to avoid retry attempts
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.config: fix logging for URL parameters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/AppCAcheBuster.js: Core.ready() does not resolve
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adjust worker initialization
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SimpleForm: use ColumnLayout as default
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection - hidden title aria-labelledby

item.title: Version 1.139.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.2

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the busy indicator appears consistently for action parameter dialogs
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where application title and navigation were not consistent when object page was embedded in the My Inbox application
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now configure the settings of related apps using the extension controller
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: qunit/Ownstatics.qunit: enhance the error message check for Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Preserve patterns in template values
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Take sortOrder into account for affectedControl during condensing

item.title: Version 1.139.4 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.139.4

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display a key property in the create dialog when the key has a text annotation and doesn't have a Core.Computed annotation

item.title: Version 1.141.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.141.2

  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: stop calling suspend on item bindings if it suspended

item.title: Version 1.141.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.141.1

  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Theming: Ensure to fully await ThemeManager

item.title: Version 1.142.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: CardHeader: headers inherit binding path from "sap.card"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageTitle: Fix flaky focus test in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Layout issue prevented
  • Library: sap.fe.ariba
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the colorPalette property in the Status building block
  • Library: sap.fe.controls
    • Type: FIX, Description: New text from SAPUI5 Fiori Elements
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use separators for grouped actions
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now determine the table type based on the service definition
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now provide the preferredAction startup parameter to automatically trigger the SmartSummary action on the object page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now use the OperationAvailable annotation to check if a user has the required permission to edit a collaborative draft
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now terminate ABAP draft sessions when users move away from the draft
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the colorPalette property in the Status building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now provide an API on the Table building block to select contexts or clear the selection
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use semantically connected fields in tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now use the WebSocketBaseURL annotation with a relative path
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now exclude hidden properties in an analytical table when using the Export feature in split mode
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use separators for grouped actions
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the colorPalette property in the Status building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now provide an API on the Table building block to select contexts or clear the selection
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use semantically connected fields in tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with selecting cells in a grid table
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the setSelectionVariant API works correctly in tables
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now provide the preferredAction startup parameter to automatically trigger the SmartSummary action on the object page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support a custom message strip on an object page
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: add AIIntegration sample to demokit
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: contentMode property for width behavior is now introduced
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've now added an itemRenameCanceled event for canceling the renaming activity of any document within UploadSetwithTable
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: allow tokenizer in forms
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent failing request when src=nullable value
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: fix wrong display of icon
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Scrollbars are now displayed on Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: correct reverse F6 focus navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: ContextMenuSetting: Missing content opacity in popin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Enable immediate selection of initially highlighted item
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageBox: fix typing of onClose callback
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: fix ESC handling when closing nested dialogs
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionController: Check for key or item in getPropertySetterChanges
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Breadcrumbs: Correct role applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.IconTabHeader: Move the focus to selected tab after selectedKey is updated
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: first token is now not truncated when not needed
    • Type: FIX, Description: xConfig: Remove correct value
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: (De)select all should ignore hidden items
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: add aria-expanded & aria-haspopup
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the tab reading order for the FeedListItem control and fixed the disappearance of action button in FeedListItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: Improve accessibility in Last/Next Options
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.SideNavigation: Added border to overflow popover
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Removed invalidate on resize
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now prevent unintended navigation after executing an action in an object page table
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now show an illustrated message if there is no data in a table
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support subsection-level loading behavior with the SubSectionId in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where application title and navigation were not consistent when object page was embedded in the My Inbox application
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the visibility of the file uploader button was not set correctly when dynamically controlled by a field control value
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where selection in filter-selection lists did not reflect in the visual filter bar in analytical list page applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the enablement state of table toolbar buttons on the list report page was not updated correctly after returning from the object page following a property change
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the rendering issue of the interactive bar chart while navigating back to list report from an object page
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationListItem: aria-description is removed
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SmartChart: Illustrated message is now supported for empty state
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.comp.ValueHelpDialog: Search field screen-reader support is now enhanced
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SmartField: Description update is now triggered by ValueListParameterIn change
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Filters in error state are now reset before applying new variant
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: setP13nData is not called when the reason is "Move"
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: align properly buttons in ValueHelpDialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Fixed calendar and fiscal tokens formatting
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: stop calling suspend on item bindings if it suspended
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: Move placeholder min-height calculation to CSS
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Backslash (\) is no longer duplicated in filter tokens
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: CollectiveSearch arrow focus is now fully visible
    • Type: FIX, Description: GroupElement is now hidden when there are no visible children
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/test/starter: document configuration types
    • Type: FIX, Description: qunit/Ownstatics.qunit: enhance the error message check for Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Router: improve the type definition for component target
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/odata/v2/ODataTreeBinding: $count requests must not contain $expand or $select
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Theming: Ensure to fully await ThemeManager
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Theming: Fix order of library.css
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Popup: Use activeElement of both light and shadow DOM to determine focus loss
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/util/_URL: Resolve URL correctly absolut when host differs
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/interaction: Cache failed requests to avoid retry attempts
    • Type: FIX, Description: ManagedObjectModel: Use original binding's length if no filters are applied
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.documentation: Layout issue fixed
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Preserve patterns in template values
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Cards: Added dateTimeWithTimezone formatter
    • Type: FIX, Description: CardHeader: headers inherit binding path from "sap.card"
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Improved error handling when destination url is undefined
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: allow tokenizer in forms
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: error message not removed if previous value selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: SortFlex: Take sortOrder into account for affectedControl during condensing
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: SAP themes are now applied to the content area of the RTE
  • Library: sap.ui.vk
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Matai.js hotspots support
    • Type: FIX, Description: DrawerToolbar unwanted separators issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: Rich text not rendered and wrong leader line color
  • Library: sap.ushell
    • Type: FIX, Description: Broken Logo in Shell Header
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.components.shell.Settings: Small resolution issue fixed.
    • Type: Fix, Description: : Adding the sap-ushell-navmode evaluation to navigation calls
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.ui.shell.ShellAppTitle: Unnecessary announcement of "All My Apps" menu removed
    • Type: FIX, Description: Do not extend sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel in FakeModel.js
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Fix scrolling when element is focused
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Prevent duplicate roles on AnchorBar
  • Library: sap.viz
    • Type: FIX, Description: Extended Colors: Exclude the specified charts
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [module:sap/ui/mdc/field/MultiValueFieldDelegate#updateItems] replaced by {@link module:sap/ui/mdc/field/MultiValueFieldDelegate.updateItemsFromConditions updateItemsFromConditions}.

item.title: Version 1.142.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.1

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Correct header repositioning in both directions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Issue with table sizing fixed

    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now set menu items defined using DataActionForGroup to be navigable
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now add the default value for an action parameter of type decimal
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display a key property in the create dialog when the key has a text annotation and doesn't have a Core.Computed annotation
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now set menu items defined using DataActionForGroup to be navigable
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly resolve action parameter values when the Common.Text annotation points to a property with the same name
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Enabled property of actions is bound correctly for grouped table actions in custom sections
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change validation behaviour of the StepInput when it has a binding model with Value State:
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now trigger a fetch call to load PDF content and determine PDF availability in the PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: xConfig: Reverts "Remove correct value"

    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Fix Korean text display within OverflowToolbar

    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: Update count correctly when no filter is applied

    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change

    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the rendering issue of the interactive line chart while navigating back to list report from an object page

    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: Improvement of UoM format handling

    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartForm: getConderserInfo method is now handles SmartForm control instance correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: GroupElement's visibility property remains unchanged if its value is bound
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Prevent duplicate shortcut announcements in screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.Opa: Fix Safari polling interval test failure
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7

    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField

    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: if ComboBox-Like wrong accessibility info

item.title: Version 1.142.6 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.6

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a jump issue in the header container by using an outline instead of a border
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: resolve iPad Safari rendering issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: DynamicDateRange can now correctly filter table
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Numeric keys are no longer parsed
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: Correct filtering from saved variant in P13n dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Short string keys now correctly select the corresponding row
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: OPA: Fix _promiseWaiter handling of null executors
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.RecurrenceUtils: Comparison of UTC dates.
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: ObjectPageLayout: prevent endless loop in ResizeHandler callbacks
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: fix wrong aria-labelledBy id references
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Ensure subsection visibility is tracked correctly

item.title: Version 1.142.7 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.7

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where referenced IDs in custom columns were not passed correctly
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined

item.title: Version 1.142.3 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.3

  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where multiple dropdown rows were created because of too many data requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We have resolved an issue where horizontal scrollbars did not render correctly in tables after exiting full-screen mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that fields that share the same value help collection can have different values in action parameter dialogs
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Create action works correctly when inline edit is enabled in a list report page
  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the parameter ordering mismatch between dependency array and function parameters in ShapeManager for Gantt 1.0
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now optimised shape sorting logic while expanding the gantt chart.
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: The aria-labelledby attribute is now correctly set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m Tokenizer: Ensure role "listbox" is applied to the correct container
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: aria-description attribute is added.
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: add visible label to the view switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBoxBase: Value state popup is now hidden when the picker is opened
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Suggestion selections are now handled correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnsController now works with the index from the table event
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField handles TextArrangement DescriptionOnly correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Corrected the logic to deselect filters
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: Selection from ValueHelp in single fields now works correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.core: make sap/ui/Device a standard AMD module
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/base: enable static inheritance for UI5 classes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Make the experimental new bootstrap the productive one
    • Type: FIX, Description: test/sap/ui/core/qunit/i18n/UI5Date.qunit.js: Fix failing test for JS Date API "toTemporalInstant"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.config: fix logging for URL parameters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/AppCAcheBuster.js: Core.ready() does not resolve
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SimpleForm: use ColumnLayout as default
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: "expanded" not announced
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.uniifed.calendar.DatesRow: adjust day names describedby references
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Remove unnecessary attributes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Form layout corruption on phone size fixed

item.title: Version 1.142.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.2

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Remove redundant announcements from sort and group list items
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: exclude disabled controls from Toolbar navigation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader and focus handling are improved
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We no longer display the placeholder on the list report page when Apply Automatically is enabled for the variant but the required SmartFilterBar field contains invalid values
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: Selection from ValueHelp in single fields now works correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.core: make sap/ui/Device a standard AMD module
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap/ui/base: enable static inheritance for UI5 classes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Make the experimental new bootstrap the productive one
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.config: fix logging for URL parameters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/AppCAcheBuster.js: Core.ready() does not resolve
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SimpleForm: use ColumnLayout as default
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Form layout corruption on phone size fixed

item.title: Version 1.142.4 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.4

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed redundant CSS attributes from the GenericTile header content to avoid the truncation of text in certain languages
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Remove premature initialise() call to fix race condition with external SVM
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: resume binding of inner controls if FilterBar disabled it
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: Obtain customized date/time format pattern
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test

item.title: Version 1.142.5 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.5

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now remove action buttons from object page subsections in key user adaptation
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the value truncation digit to 5 for the harvey ball micro chart and the value varies between languages
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update

item.title: Version 1.142.8 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.8

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue on the analytical list page where navigation failed after selecting a value from value help and pressing Enter

item.title: Version 1.143.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.143.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: has correct margins / paddings
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support XML templating for building blocks in addXML flex changes
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support EDM JSON expressions in updatable restriction annotations
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the disableStrictHandling manifest setting to disable 412 warning messages
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display a key property in the create dialog when the key has a text annotation and doesn't have a Core.Computed annotation
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: The ConditionalSwitch building block is no longer experimental and is suitable for productive usage
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support EDM JSON expressions in updatable restriction annotations
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the disableStrictHandling manifest setting to disable 412 warning messages
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom fields are added correctly to variants
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support EDM JSON expressions in updatable restriction annotations
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the disableStrictHandling manifest setting to disable 412 warning messages
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MessageStrip: ColorSet and colorScheme properties are now added to customize appearances
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: disable mobile multi-select button when no tokens
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: fixed menuPosition functionality
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Remove custom shadow overwriting
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Group header announced only once
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#checkUpdate: only fire change if data has changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: fixed context menu appearance in RTL
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Switch: change state when space is clicked together with shift or espace is prevented.
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed the iframe content check while loading a PDF to display it
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.CheckBox: Condensed layout corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendar: Add the browser event information to the UI5 event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: fix test about timezone failing in safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: open menu with arrow down + alt is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: Icon only status has correct aria and tooltip
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the width of slideTile and genericTile when they are placed inside a ushell section
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: largerStep is working with floating point numbers now
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessagePopover: AriaLabelledBy element is now created
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: Update count correctly when no filter is applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: range validation is working properly now when there is binding for valueState but no value is provided
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: Picker now closes on table scroll
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: has correct placeholder
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.BasePanel: fix RangeSelect with keyboard handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.FilterPanel: add tooltip support for labels
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: close picker on context change
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Correct dropdown width when wrapItemsText enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: the build is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: add a view settings dialog items active announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: Fixed Menu Title left padding in mobile view
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectAttribute: Empty indicator is displayed correctly
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Key user adaptation now provides table configuration options based on the table type
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue on the analytical list page where navigation failed after selecting a value from value help and pressing Enter
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationList: Fixed failing test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationList: Fixed failing test
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct and the value state is not overriden when not necessary
    • Type: FIX, Description: GroupElement's visibility property remains unchanged if its value is bound
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartForm: getConderserInfo method is now handles SmartForm control instance correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Custom filter fields error state should be handled by application lifecycle
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct when same invalid value is entered and no error is thrown
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct when same invalid value is entered and no error is thrown
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: validation for input is now correct when same invalid value is entered
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartChart: large numbers for measures are no correctly handled
    • Type: FIX, Description: : BaseValueListProvider: correctly set out parameter to DynamicDateRange FieldTypes
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Corrected the logic to deselect filters
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#cloneData: use a clone for this.oTreeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/routing: no usage of history state API in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#checkUpdate: only fire change if data has changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/LabelEnablement: Verify control existence before keeping DOM after destroy
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/thirdparty: bump RequireJS to 2.3.7
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/performance/Measurement: Avoid multiple XHRInterceptor registrations
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/test/: manually fire focus events when browser inactive
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Component: Propagate ownerId to onModelCreated hook
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/base/security/sanitizeHTML: Add support for `text-decoration-line` CSS property
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Icon source can now be relative to the host root
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Now the pagination card data is refreshed when the main card data is refreshed
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: SemanticFormElement: _updateDisplayText does no longer fail without available _displayField
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: table.ResponsiveTableType: Add "popinDisplay" setting
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC: ValueHelp Typeahead: MTable keyboard navigation overrides now only consider arrow up/down not left/right
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.Chart: IllustratedMessage button for changing chart type is no longer visible when there are no visible measures
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC.Chart: large numbers for measures are now correctly formatted
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.Field: Implement IToolbarInteractiveControl interface
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Add placeholder support for RichTextEditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Inserting URLs with special characters via insert link dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Correct content_css path resolution in RichTextEditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Fix content CSS path and skip failing tests
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Ensure RichTextEditor content CSS is loaded correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/model/ClientTreeBinding#checkUpdate: only fire change if data has changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Remove renderWhitespace restriction
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.unified.ColorPicker: Align to accessibility spec
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.ColorPicker: alpha slider background is updated
  • Library: sap.ushell
    • Type: FIX, Description: News tile: remove duplicate tabstop and fix accessibility issues
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell: Wording corrected based on customer feedback and UA alignment.
    • Type: FIX, Description: Wrong encoding for hashes in iframe URLs
    • Type: FIX, Description: search button rendering w/ and w/o web components
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: fix wrapping titles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: prevent infinite rerendering loop
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: prevent flickering on scroll
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#getDomRef] Do not access the card dom reference, as this is not supported in a mobile native environment.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#getModel] Avoid accessing the models directly, use the binding syntax instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#getParameters] Use <code>getCombinedParameters()</code> instead.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.CardFacade#setVisible] Use <code>hide()</code> to hide a card opened by <code>showCard()</code>. The card facade does not provide methods for showing or hiding the main card itself.
